content:
📜 2. Archetype Purges Require a Sacrifice from Another Player of Specific Status

📜 To purge an archetype, a sacrifice must be made by someone meeting a specific condition.

✔ How Archetype Purges Work:
• Purging can only occur once per day.
• To purge, a player must convince someone of a relevant status to make a sacrifice.
• The purge only succeeds if the sacrifice is made.

✔ Who Must Offer a Sacrifice for a Purge?
• If purging into a new archetype → A player of that archetype must give up something.
• If abandoning an archetype → A player of the same archetype must offer a cost to maintain balance.
• If shifting alignment → A player of the opposite alignment must willingly take a penalty.

✔ Example Purge Scenarios:
• A Scholar wants to become a Trickster → A Trickster must sacrifice an item to let them in.
• A Warrior wants to purge into a neutral state → Another Warrior must take a debuff in return.
• A Devout wants to abandon their faith → A player of an opposing alignment must endure penance.
